summary: ANDROID 🟥 FMD | When onboarding and 'Dont allow' for location selected then in FMD in main settings dialog keep showing
scenario: Find My Device dialog repeatedly pops up in main settings when location access is denied during onboarding
description_clean: When onboarding and 'Don't allow' is selected for location access, the Find My Device (FMD) dialog in main settings keeps popping up repeatedly. After enabling location in Android settings and returning to FMD, the dialog no longer appears. The bug is reproducible only once at the beginning.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or clear data).
2. During onboarding, when prompted for location permission, select 'Don't allow'.
3. Complete onboarding and land on the Home screen.
4. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → Settings (gear icon) → Find My Device.
5. Observe that the Find My Device dialog (requesting location access) appears.
6. Dismiss the dialog (e.g., tap outside or press Back).
7. Navigate away from Find My Device and then return to it again (Poly Studio Mobile → Settings → Find My Device).
8. Observe that the Find My Device dialog appears again.
9. Repeat steps 6–8 multiple times to confirm the dialog keeps popping up repeatedly.
10. Go to Android Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Permissions → Location → Allow all the time (or Allow only while using the app).
11. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → Settings → Find My Device.
12. Observe that the Find My Device dialog no longer appears.
expected: After selecting 'Don't allow' for location during onboarding, the Find My Device dialog should appear only once when first entering the Find My Device settings screen. It should not reappear repeatedly on subsequent visits.
actual: The Find My Device dialog keeps popping up repeatedly each time the user navigates to the Find My Device settings screen after denying location permission during onboarding. The dialog only stops appearing after location permission is granted in Android system settings.
